SOC/ROC. Height (in inches) CHAR 2 x x x
M1060_WEIGHT M1060 Height and Weight - Weight (in pounds) This field indicates the most recent base weight in the last 30 days; measure weight consistently, according to standard agency practice (for example, in a.m. after voiding, before meal, with shoes off, etc.) Weight (in pounsds) CHAR 3 x x x
M1311_NBR_STG2 M1311 (M1309) Number Of Unhealed Pressure Ulcers - Stage II This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage II.
